'''鈭歷-l-j-w''' ('''kavaljewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jowter|jowter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jowter|jowter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-l-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavaljewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaljewoko|thivaljewoko]] || [[word:jivaljewoko|jivaljewoko]] || [[word:shivaljewoko|shivaljewoko]] || [[word:kivaljewoko|kivaljewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
